endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Resources/deployments/{deploymentName}
endpoints.description: Create a named template deployment using a template.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{DEPLOYMENTNAME}} with a real deploymentname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
